sentence: 安装前请先仔细阅读说明书。
pinyin: Ānzhuāng qián qǐng xiān zǐxì yuèdú shuōmíngshū.
english: Please read the instruction manual carefully before installation.

sentence: 科学家拍到了第一张黑洞的照片。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā pāi dào le dì yī zhāng hēidòng de zhàopiàn.
english: Scientists captured the first photograph of a black hole.

meaning: 1. to divide into portions; 2. to package in smaller quantities; 3. to
sentence: 她把糖果分装进小袋子里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ tángguǒ fēnzhuāng jìn xiǎo dàizi lǐ.
english: She divided the candies into small bags.

meaning: 1. to bid; 2. to make a tender
sentence: 三家公司同时参与了这个项目的投标。
pinyin: Sān jiā gōngsī tóngshí cānyù le zhège xiàngmù de tóubiāo.
english: Three companies simultaneously bid on this project.

pinyin: Tā shēng le yī duì shuāngshēng jiěmèi.
english: She gave birth to a pair of twin sisters.
